documentation.content: The aoe2-api-proxy is returning 5xx errors. Check logs: gcloud logging read 'resource.type=cloud_run_revision AND resource.labels.service_name=aoe2-api-proxy AND severity>=ERROR' --freshness=30m

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name = "aoe2-api-proxy" AND metric.type = "run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND metric.labels.response_code_class = "5xx"
